import numpy as np
import scipy.linalg as LA

# Constants
BOARD_SIZE = 40
G2J = 30  # Go to Jail square
JAIL = 10  # Jail square
CC_POS = [2, 17, 33]  # Community Chest squares
CH_POS = [7, 22, 36]  # Chance squares
RAILROADS = [5, 15, 25, 35]  # Railroad squares
UTILITIES = [12, 28]  # Utility squares

NUM_STATES = 120  # 40 positions * 3 double counts (0,1,2)

# Helper functions
def next_R(pos):
    sorted_rr = sorted(RAILROADS)
    candidates = [r for r in sorted_rr if r > pos] + sorted_rr
    return min(candidates)  # Smallest > pos, or the first

def next_U(pos):
    sorted_ut = sorted(UTILITIES)
    candidates = [u for u in sorted_ut if u > pos] + sorted_ut
    return min(candidates)  # Smallest > pos, or the first

# Build transition matrix P (120 x 120)
P = np.zeros((NUM_STATES, NUM_STATES))

for i in range(NUM_STATES):  # For each state i
    pos = i // 3  # Position (0-39)
    doubles = i % 3  # Consecutive doubles (0,1,2)
    
    for die1 in range(1, 5):  # Two 4-sided dice
        for die2 in range(1, 5):
            sum_roll = die1 + die2
            is_double = (die1 == die2)
            new_doubles = doubles + 1 if is_double else 0
            
            if new_doubles == 3:  # Three doubles: go to Jail
                final_pos = JAIL
                next_doubles_final = 0
                j = final_pos * 3 + next_doubles_final
                P[i, j] += 1 / 16  # Probability of this roll
            else:
                tentative_pos = (pos + sum_roll) % BOARD_SIZE
                if tentative_pos == G2J:  # G2J: go to Jail
                    final_pos = JAIL
                    next_doubles_final = 0
                    j = final_pos * 3 + next_doubles_final
                    P[i, j] += 1 / 16
                elif tentative_pos in CC_POS:  # Community Chest
                    j_go = 0 * 3 + new_doubles  # To GO
                    j_jail = JAIL * 3 + 0  # To Jail
                    j_stay = tentative_pos * 3 + new_doubles  # Stay
                    P[i, j_go] += (1 / 16) * (1 / 16)  # To GO
                    P[i, j_jail] += (1 / 16) * (1 / 16)  # To Jail
                    P[i, j_stay] += (1 / 16) * (14 / 16)  # Stay
                elif tentative_pos in CH_POS:  # Chance
                    for card in range(16):  # 16 cards
                        if card == 0:  # To GO
                            final_pos_card = 0
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        elif card == 1:  # To JAIL
                            final_pos_card = JAIL
                            next_doubles_card = 0
                        elif card == 2:  # To C1 (11)
                            final_pos_card = 11
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        elif card == 3:  # To E3 (24)
                            final_pos_card = 24
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        elif card == 4:  # To H2 (39)
                            final_pos_card = 39
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        elif card == 5:  # To R1 (5)
                            final_pos_card = 5
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        elif card == 6 or card == 7:  # To next R
                            final_pos_card = next_R(tentative_pos)
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        elif card == 8:  # To next U
                            final_pos_card = next_U(tentative_pos)
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        elif card == 9:  # Go back 3
                            final_pos_card = (tentative_pos - 3) % BOARD_SIZE
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        else:  # Stay (cards 10-15)
                            final_pos_card = tentative_pos
                            next_doubles_card = new_doubles
                        j = final_pos_card * 3 + next_doubles_card
                        P[i, j] += (1 / 16) * (1 / 16)  # Roll prob * Card prob
                else:  # No special square
                    j = tentative_pos * 3 + new_doubles
                    P[i, j] += 1 / 16

# Compute stationary distribution
eigenvalues, eigenvectors = LA.eig(P.T, left=True)  # Left eigenvectors
idx = np.argmin(np.abs(eigenvalues - 1))  # Eigenvalue closest to 1
stationary = np.real(eigenvectors[:, idx])  # Real part
stationary = stationary / np.sum(stationary)  # Normalize

# Probability per square: sum over double counts
prob_per_square = [sum(stationary[k*3 + d] for d in range(3)) for k in range(40)]

# Get the three most popular squares (highest probabilities)
top_three = sorted(range(40), key=lambda k: prob_per_square[k], reverse=True)[:3]

# Form the six-digit string
modal_string = f"{top_three[0]:02d}{top_three[1]:02d}{top_three[2]:02d}"
print(modal_string)  # Output the answer
